title: Lunglei DEO-in SIR 2026 kalpui mek chungchangah thu thar theh darhtute a kawm
content:
825/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 3:Lunglei District Election Officer (DEO) Pi Navneet Mann chuan vawiin khan a hna thawh pindanah thu thar theh darhtute kawmin, Election Commission of India (ECI) bul tuma May ni 20, 2026 aṭanga September ni 6, 2026 inkar chhunga uluk zawka electoral roll siam ṭhat runpui, Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of Electoral Rolls kalpui meka Lunglei District-a hma lakna kal mek leh hmachhawpte a hrilhfiah.

Lunglei DEO Pi Navneet Mann chuan SIR chu elecoral roll-a chuang tur dik takte kim taka an chuan a, a chuang lo turte dah luh an nih lohna tur leh electoral roll dik leh felfai zawk a awm theihna tura kalpui a nih thu a sawi a. ECI leh Mizoram CEO aṭanga tih tur ruahmante chu Lunglei District-ah ṭha taka hlen chhuah zel a nih thu sawiin, May ni 30 aṭangin BLO-te'n an huam chhung in tinah kal chilhin electoral roll-a chuang mekte nihna kimchang chhinchhiahna, 'Enumeration Form' sem, dah khah leh lak khawm an kalpui mek thu a sawi a. Enumeration Form theh lutte aṭangin Draft Electoral Roll siam a nih dawn avangin mipuite'n ngaih pawimawh a ṭul thu sawiin, SIR chungchanga hma lakna hrang hrang leh mipui hriat tur pawimawh puanzar kawngah media mite thawhpuina leh ṭawiawmna a ngen nghal.

Lunglei DEO Pi Navneet Mann hi Election Officer Pi Lalhruaitluangi leh SDC Pu Deepak Godara te'n an ṭawiawm a. Thu thar theh darhtute hi Mizoram Journalists' Association (MJA) Lunglei District President Pu H. Lalthansanga'n hovin, Lunglei District-a SIR kalpui meka hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrangte an sawi ho va. Media mite'n hriat duh an neih an zawhte chu DEO leh official-te'n chhangin, hlawhtling taka SIR kalpui a nih theih nana rawtna hrang hrang an sawi ho bawk.

Vawiin vek khan DEO ho hian a hna thawh pindanah Election official-te, Electoral Registration Officer (ERO) leh Assistant Electoral Registration Officer (AERO)-te chuan SIR kalpui meka Enumeration Form sem, dah khah leh lak khawm kalpui mek dan thlir hovin, hlawhtling taka kalpui chhunzawm a nih theih nana ruahmanna leh ṭul hrang hrangte an sawi ho bawk.

Lunglei District hnuaiah Assembly Constituency paruk — 30-Lunglei North, 31-Lunglei East, 32-Lunglei West, 33-Lunglei South, 34-Thorang leh 35-West Tuipui awmin, voter 1,03,037 an awm mek a. Polling Station 180 awmin, BLO 180, BLO Supervisor 28 leh Assistant BLO 64 an awm a. SIR atan hian political party hrang hrang ai awh Booth Level Agent mi 580 ruat an ni bawk.

Vawiin khan a ni 5-na atan BLO-te chuan Enumeration Form sem chhunzawmin, tlai dar 6 thlenga report a luh danin, Lunglei District-ah Enumeration Form 75,826 (73.59%) sem chhuah a ni tawh.

Attachment

title: ECI Deputy Director Shri Apurva Kumar Singh Visits Mizoram; Reviews SIR 2026 Media and Communication Preparedness
content:
139/2026-2027

Aizawl, 3 June 2026:As part of the ongoing Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of Electoral Rolls, ECI Deputy Director Shri Apurva Kumar Singh, IIS, arrived in Mizoram today on an official visit.

During his visit, Shri Singh met with the Chief Electoral Officer (CEO) of Mizoram, Smt. Garima Gupta, IAS, at the CEO's Office in Aizawl. Following the meeting, he conducted a training session on media and communication for District Media Nodal Officers (DMNOs) from across the state at the MINECO Secretariat Conference Hall, Aizawl.

The session focused on communication strategies related to the Special Intensive Revision, key challenges that may arise during its implementation, and measures to strengthen public awareness and participation.

The programme was chaired by Mizoram Joint Chief Electoral Officer, Smt. Ethel Rothangpuii, who reminded the officers of the important role they play in ensuring the success of the revision exercise. She encouraged them to carry out their responsibilities with dedication and commitment.

Addressing the participants, Shri Apurva Kumar Singh stated that the objective of the Special Intensive Revision is to ensure that all eligible Indian citizens aged 18 years and above are included in the electoral roll, while preventing the inclusion of ineligible persons. He emphasized that effective public outreach and awareness are essential to the success of the revision process and urged the officers to give due importance to publicity and documentation activities.

District Media Nodal Officers andDistrict Media Assistant Nodal Officersalso presented updates on the activities undertaken so far and outlined their proposed plans for the coming weeks.

During the training, Shri Singh presented the Media and Communication Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) and explained various methods for effectively communicating SIR-related information to the public and publicising important procedures. The session concluded with an interactive question-and-answer segment.

Shri Apurva Kumar Singh is scheduled to visit an Electoral Registration Officer (ERO) office tomorrow and oversee the distribution of Enumeration Forms by Booth Level Officers (BLOs). He is also scheduled to address a press conference in the afternoon.

Attachment

title: Champhaiah Fisheries Department-in Insulated- Refrigerator Van semchhuak
content:
824/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 3rd June 2026:Vawiin khan DFDO Office Champhai chuan Insulated -Refrigerator Van (Sangha vawt ah dahna Motor) an semchhuak a, he hun hi Champhai District Bawrhsap leh Chairman DLC PMMSY Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan a hmanpui.

Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan thu sawiin, sangha vawn thatna tha tak Fisheries Department-in an chhawpchhuak thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, hun kal zel turah beneficiary tam zawk an rawn awm zel a duhsak a, he van hi Pu Lalrinawma tan chauh a tangkai dawn lo tih sawiin sangha khawi te bakah sangha hmanga eizawngte tan hlei hlei a tangkai dawn tih a sawi a, tangkai taka hmang turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

He hun hi Pi Lalremsangpuii DFDO chuan kaihhruaiin hetiang a Van tha Champhai in an dawng thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin hun lo la kal zel turah pawh Fisheries chauh in a hamthatna hi nei loin Agriculture allied Dept dang Agriculture, Horticulture, Sericulture leh AH&Vety Department-te pawhin an hman tangkai theih tur a nih thu a sawi a, Mizoram hi marketing leh by-product lam ah kan than chhoh zel avangin he motor hi Fish Farmer Assoctiation Champhai District a lo kal zawng zawng te pawhin chhawr tangkai se a duh thu a sawi.

He tanpuina hi 60:40 a lo kal niin Beneficiary atan Pu Lalrinawma, champhai Vengthlang chu thlan niin Department lam hian nuai 12 pe in anni hian nuai 6 vel an seng ve thung.

DFDO chuan hetiang a Fish farmer zinga District pum huap ngaituah vanga inseng ngam an hmu thei hi lawmawm a tih thu a tarlang bawk.

He hawnna programme ah hian DLC board member te leh Department atanga HOO te bakah Fish Farmer Association Champhai District atangin he programme hi an chhim a ni.

Attachment

title: ECI Deputy Director Pu Apurva Kumar Singh chuan SIR 2026 kalpui mek chungchangah Mizoram tlawhin, DMNO-te Media & Communication training a pe
content:
823/2026-2027

Aizawl, 3rd June 2026:Election Commission of India (ECI) bul tuma May ni 20, 2026 aṭanga September ni 6, 2026 inkar chhunga uluk zawka electoral roll siam ṭhat runpui, Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of Electoral Rolls kalpui mek chungchangah ECI Deputy Director Pu Apurva Kumar Singh, IIS, chuan Mizoram rawn tlawhin, Mizoram Chief Electoral Officer (CEO) Pi Garima Gupta, IAS, nen a pisaah an inkawm a. Hemi hnu hian MINECO Aizawla Secretariat Conference Hall-ah Mizoram District hrang hranga media lama mawhphurtu, District Media Nodal Officer (DMNO)-te nen Media & Communication chungchanga hma lakna kal mek thlir hovin, hma lak zel dan tur an sawi ho.

He hun hi Mizoram Joint Chief Electoral Officer Pi Ethel Rothangpuii chuan kaihruaiin, inlawmna thu a sawi a. ECI hmalaknaa SIR kalpui tawhna state-ah hlawhtling taka kalpui a nih thu sawiin, Mizoramah pawh hlawhtling taka kalpui turin mawhphurhna hrang hrang neite'n theih tawp an chhuah thu a sawi.

ECI Deputy Director Pu Apurva Kumar Singh chuan SIR chu India khua leh tui kum 18 tling chin, electoral roll-a chuang theite kim taka electoral roll-a an chuan theihna tur leh vote nei thei lote roll-a an chuan lohna tura hma lakna pawimawh tak a nih thu a sawi a. SIR hlawhtling taka kalpui a nih theih nan media kal tlanga zau taka puanzar leh hma lakna hrang hrangte tar lan a pawimawh thu sawiin, chumi atan chuan ruahmanna fel tak duan lawk a, chumi anga hma lak chu a pawimawh thu a sawi a. SIR kaihhnawiha hma lakna hrang hrang thlalak leh video ṭha taka dah ṭha a, media leh social media hrang hrang kal tlanga zau zawka theh darh zel turin mawhphurtute a chah.

He hunah hian District hrang hranga District Media Nodal Officers lehDistrict Media Assistant Nodal Officers-te'n an hma lak tawhna leh hmachhawpte an sawi a. ECI Deputy Director Pu Apurva Kumar Singh chuan powerpoint presentation hmangin "Media & Communication SOP" zirtirin, SIR chungchang puanzar leh tihlar kawnga hma lak dan tur leh ngaih pawimawh tur hrang hrang a zirtir a. Zawhna leh chhanna leh sawi hona hun hman a ni bawk.

Pu Apurva Kumar Singh hian naktukah ERO office tlawhin, BLO ten Enumeration Form an sem dan te a enpui ang a. Chawhnu lamah chanchinthar lakhawmtute kawmna hun a hmang dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit District chhung a mi tur thlai tiak District Bawrhsapin vailiam
content:
822/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 3rd of June, 2026 :Vawiin khan District Agriculture Office Complex atangin Pu Suvigya S Chandra, IAS, District Bawrhsap chuan Agroforestry scheme hnuaia thlai tiak – Kuhva, Zawngtah, Tung leh Khanghu tiakte a vai liam.

District Bawrhsap chuan thlai chi leh a ṭiak hrisel loneitute'n an neih a pawimawh thu sawiin, Agroforestry hnuaia thlai tiak sem a ni thei hi lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Green Ag Project hlawhtlin nan District Agriculture Officer te nen a thawhho ṭhat a pawimawh thu leh loneitute dinhmun chawikang tura ṭha tak a thawkho turin a fuih a ni.

Thlai tiak te hi Mamit District-a Green Ag covered area ah te a thlawna sem chhuah leh tur niin W. Phailengah motor 10 hmangin phurh a ni a. Thlai tiak hi a sem thawhkhatna niin, avaiin 25,000 sem tum a ni.

title: Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuii’n District Hospital, Siaha-ah CT Scan khawl thar leh RtPCR laboratory thar a hawng
content:
821/2026-2027Siaha the 3rd June 2026:Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan vawiin khan District Hospital Siaha-ah CT Scan khawl thar leh RtPCR laboratory thar a hawng. He Hawnna inkhawm tawiah hian District Bawrhsap Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte leh CMO Dr Lalrengpuii bakah sawrkar official ten Minister hi an tawiawm a, District Medical Superintendent Dr Lalrosanga’n he hun hi a kaihruai a ni.

Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan Kalkhawmte chu chibai bukin District Hospital in nasa taka hma a sawn theihna tura department hrang hrang thawhhonaah lawmthu a sawi. Hospital a thawkte thawhrimna leh inpekna chu chhuanawm a tih thu sawiin an in pekna ropui tak chuan rah duhawm tak a chhuah fo reng a ni a ti. Hospital in service a pek theih te a tam thei ang bera mipuiin an hriat theih nan uar leh zuala inhrilhhriatna  (public awareness) neih a pawimawh a, hospital in khawl tha tak tak a neih te chu tangkai taka hman a nih theih nan mipui pawhin an hriat a pawimawh a ti bawk.

Minister chuan RT-PCR Laboratory thar leh CT scan thar hawn tak te chu Siaha district in bung thar a kaina chhuanawm tak a ni a ti a, health infrastructure leh diagnostic service-tihchakna kawnga hmasawnna pawimawh tak a ni a ti.

COVID-19 hripui atangin natna hri hmuhchhuahna chak leh rinawm, inbuatsaihna tha a pawimawhzia a lang chiang a, RT-PCR Laboratory hawn tak chu hrileng dang pawh lo awm se inbuatsaihna tha lo neih lawk theihna tura din a ni ta chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi. Siaha District a Health Care service tichangtlungtu leh ti hmasawntu a nih ngei theih nan duhsakna a hlan nghal a ni.

Attachment

title: Siaha-ah Social Welfare Minister in ruihhlo tihralna hmanpui
content:
820/2026-2027

Siaha the 3rd June 2026:Social Welfare Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan vawiin khan MTP Hqrts ten an Kumpuan ‘Ruihhlo Do’ puala beihpui thlakna kalzela thlakhat chhunga an man ruihhlo cheng 3,387,200/- man tihralna hun a hmanpui. MTP President S Vabeihasa chuan he hun hi a kaihruai a ni.

MTP office tualzawla hun tawi hmannah Minister chuan thusawiin sawrkarna fawng an vawn tirh atangin Mizoram Sawrkar chuan thalai tam tak tibuaia, nunna hlu tak suattu Ruihhlo do chu a ngai pawimawh takzet a, Mizoram Social Defence & Rehabilitation Board te, Nasha Mukh Bharat Abhiyan (NMBA) te kaltlanga sawrkar in khawtlang thenfai a tumna kawnga MTP leh tlawmngai pawl hrang hrang ten theihtawp an lo chhuahpui thin chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi. Dan ang taka damdawi zuar tura sawrkar in phalna a pek pharmacy thenkhat atanga damdawi zawrh phal loh zuar te, licence mumal nei lova ruihtheihthil zuar tawk an awm thin chu pawi a tih thu sawiin chutiang ti thin te chu ti tawh lo turin a ngen a ni. Minister chuan tlawmngai pawl te chu Siaha District ti thianghlim a, ruihhlo awmlohna district a nih theih nan theihtawp chhuah chhunzawm zel tura chahin duhsakna a hlan chhunzawm nghal a ni.

He hunah hian Pu KT Beicho, IRAS (Rtd), Legal Advisor MTP Hqrts pawhin MTP in an mamawh hrang hrang Minister hnenah hian a thlen a, a hlawhtlin ngei theih nan theihtawp chhuah a tum thuin Minister hian a chhang a ni.

Vawiina zu leh Ruihhlo tihral tak te hi a vaiin cheng 3,387,200/- man niin chungte chu:

1. Codeine -2228 Nos x Rs 500  = Rs 1,114,000/-

2. ⁠Tapentadol - 103 box & 13 Strip= 1160 x Rs 1500 =  Rs 1,740,000/-

3. ⁠Spasmend - 89 box (890 strip) x Rs 50 = Rs 44,500/-

4. ⁠Micro Gaba- 30 Box(300 Strip) x Rs 200 = Rs 60,000/-

5. ⁠Heroin (No4) - 6 Hawng x Rs 60000 = Rs 3,60,000/-

6. ⁠SAHMA (LIQUOR)

a) Local: 160 Ltr x Rs 300 = Rs 48,000/-

b) Royal Stag: 9 Btls x Rs 1500 =Rs 13,500/-

c) Beer : 24 Cane x Rs 300  = Rs 7,200

Total= Rs 3,387,200-(Rupees Thirty Three Lakhs Eighty Seven Thousand and Two Hundred Only) a ni.

title: Mamit District Level Committee on Green Mizoram thukhawm
content:
819/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 3rd of June, 2026 :Vawiin khan Mamit District Level on Greeen Mizoram Day chu Pu Suvigya S. Chandra, Chairman, Mamit District Level on Green Mizoram/District Bawrhsap kaihruainain thutkhawm a ni.

District Bawrhsap chuan kalkhawmte chibai bukin, Green Mizoram Day - 2026 hlawk leh tha taka hman a nih theih nana ngaihtuahna kan hman tlan a tul thu leh kan thingphunte enkawl zuina kawnga tan kan lak thar a tul thu a sawi.

Pu Solai Azyu, Member Secretary/DFO, Mamit chuan report pein kum hmasa lama Green Mizoram Day hman tawh dante tarlangin, Village Level Fire Prevention Award, 2026 lawmman dawngtute a tarlang a, lawmman dawngtute hi pakhatna Mamit Bazar veng, pahnihna, New W. Phaileng leh pathumna Marpara Mizo vengte an ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Green Mizoram Day, 2026 hmanna hmun atan Vaisam Park ( LAD Park) ah chawhma dar 11:00 hun hawnna neih nise tih a ni a, kumin atana thingtiak phun belh bakah nikum lama lo phun tawhte samfai leh enkawl chhunzawmna hun atan hman nise tih a ni.

Attachment

title: MAMIT DISTRICT TOURISM DESTINATION MANAGEMENT COMMITTEE (DTDMC) THUKHAWM
content:
818/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 3rd of June, 2026:Nimin khan DC Conference Hall (LAD Building), Mamit-ah District Tourism Destination Management Committee (DTDMC) chu Pu Suvigya S Chandra, IAS, Deputy Commissioner, Mamit District hovin neih a ni.

District Bawrhsap chuan tourism hi sumdawnna leh hna thar tam tak siam theihna a nih theih thu leh Mamit District chu a ram hmunhma leh inkalpawhna tha avangin tourism lamah hmasawn thei tak a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Thutkhawmah hian District chhunga tourist te tana tlawhpawh mai theih tur hmun chungchang sawiho a ni a, Mamit District Village Council zawng zawngte hnenah tourist te hip thei tur hmun nuam awm thei tur, Guest house, Homestay leh tourism-a hman theih dangte chu zawng chhuak a, DC office-ah hriattir nise tih niin, Tourist-te hun rei zawk an awm theih nan Public Toilet, ei leh inna hmun tha, transportation leh hospitality service tih changtlung dan turte pawh ngaihtuah a ni.

Thukhawm hian adventure tourism leh eco-tourism hmasawnna turte pawh sawiho a ni a. ATV ride, cycling festival, jeep safari, motorcycle tourism, nature walk, bird watching, trekking, rock climbing, zipline, paragliding leh tourism activity-te neih theih dan  ngaihtuah a ni a. Dapchhuah-a Tut River hmasawnna project sawi lan niin, Kayak, Rowboat,Jet ski leh tourist-te cham theihna tur hmun siam chungchang sawiho niin tourism hmasawnna atan Zongaw–Khanthuam–Tuirum inkara nature trail siam dan zirchianna leh campsite hmun remchang thlan chungchangte pawh rel a ni.

Meeting hian Vaisam Park (LAD Park) hmasawnna chungchang pawh sawiho a ni a, Green Mizoram Day pualin Mamit District-a thing leh pangpar lar te LAD Park leh Mamit khua luhna Highway Gate hmunah phun ni se tih a bawk.

Attachment

title: LOK SABHA MP PU RICHARD VANLALHMANGAIHA HOVIN SERCHHIP-AH DISHA THUTKHAWM NEIH A NI
content:
817/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 3rdJune 2026:Vawiin khan District Development Coordination Monitoring Committee DISHA, Serchhip District chu Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha, MP Lok Sabha hovin an ṭhukhawm.

Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan DISHA chu Central sawrkarin a ngaih pawimawh thu sawiin meeting chu hmang ṭangkai turin memberte a chah a, India sawrkar programme leh scheme hrang hrangte chu hlawk thei ang bera hman a nih theih nan DISHA chu a pawimawh em em a ni, a ti.

Meeting hi District Bawrhsap leh DISHA Member Secretary ni bawk Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan   a kaihruai a. Dr. Malsawmtluanga Fanchun, Project Director, DRDO chuan DISHA Meeting hnuhnung ber thurel bawhzui a nih dan a pharh a, committee thurel bawhzui a nih dan chu a ṭha thawkhata ngaih a ni.

Serchhip District DISHA ah hian Centrally Sponsored Scheme chi hrang hrang hmanga District chhunga hna thawhte thlirho a ni a. Department hrang hranga District Office enkawltute chuan an kova tla CSS chungchanga an hmalak tawh dante leh an hmachhawpte an sawi fiah a, sawihona hun hman a ni.

DISHA-ah hian MP Lok Sabha chu Chairman niin MP Rajya Sabha chu Co-Chiarman a ni a, District chhunga MLA zawng zawngte chu member an nih bakah khawtlanga mi rawnkai thlan chhuah mi 3 member an ni bawk a. District chhunga CSS enkawltu department hotute an tel bawk a ni.

title: SERCHHIP SP HRIATTIRNA
content:
816/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 3rdJune 2026:Serchhip SP Pu Gavit Gogna chuanMizoram State Sawrkar Notification No.B 12021/10/04-TRP dated 22.08.2008 leh Section 115 of MV Act, 1988 in thuneihna a pek angin, a hnuaia mi ang hian thupek a chhuah.

National Highway (NH-02), DTO Office (Darnam), Serchhip atanga Sailiam chu PWD, Serchhip Division-in kawng siamthat hna an thawh dawn avangin Heavy Motor Vehicle (HMV) leh Medium Motor Vehicle (MMV) te tan he kawngah hian motor intlanchhawk a ngai dawn a, motor tlan dan tur chu In-Charge, Traffic Branch, Serchhip in ruahmanna a siam ang.

He thupek hi Ni 03.06.2026 (Nilaini) atanga 14.06.2026 (Pathianni) thleng, thu leh awm hma chu hman tur a ni.

title: SAITUAL POLICE TEN HEROIN TAM THAM TAK AN MAN
content:
815/2026-2027

Saitual, the 3rd June, 2026: Saitual DEF Special team te chuan June ni 1, 2026 (Thawhtanni) khan Heroin 587 gms ₹1,17,40,000 man hun an man.

Saitual DEF Special Team chuan Keifang kualmawia random checking an kalpui laiin, Churachandpur atanga Aizawl lam pan motor Bolero Neo (A rawng dum) reg no. MN01AX0569 chu Thawhtanni, zing dar 3:00 vel khan tih din a ni.

Motora chuang zinga pakhat Nengshi Haokip (51) d/o Jangsem Haokip of Salbung, Churachanpur, Manipur chu rinhlelhna avangin hmeichhe constable in a taksa a endik a,  Section 50 NDPS Act hnuaiah ama phalna ngeiin, SDPO  hriatpuinain a endik a ni.

A taksa an enfiahna lamah hian, sahbawn bawm 50, a chhunga heroin awm chu a thawhnaw chhungah thuhruk a ni tih hmuhchhuah a ni a, a bag ken te pawh endik nghal a ni. Heroin 587 gms, ₹ 1,17,40,000/-  man hu chu he motora chuang an endik tak atang hian man a ni a, Mobile handset Vivo (a pawl) mansak bawk niin, dan anga a chungah hmalak nghal a ni bawk. He case hi Saitual PS-ah ziah luh nghal a ni.

Attachment

title: Union Minister for Information & Broadcasting and Parliamentary Affairs Visits ICAR and Various Educational Institutions in Kolasib
content:
138/2026-2027

Kolasib, 3 June 2026:Shri Dr. L. Murugan, Union Minister of State for Information & Broadcasting and Parliamentary Affairs, who is currently on a visit to Kolasib, toured several government initiatives and educational institutions in the district this morning. He was accompanied by Shri H. Dolianbuaia, Deputy Commissioner, Shri Lalrinpuia Varte, Superintendent of Police, Shri Vanlalchhana, District Education Officer and Smt C. Lalremruati, District Child Protection Officer.

The Union Minister first visited the Regional Sports Training Centre (RSTC), Saidan, where trainees presented a football exhibition match. Discussions were also held on measures required for the further development and strengthening of the centre.

He then visited PM Government Model Primary School-I, Kolasib, a PM SHRI (PM Schools for Rising India) institution. During an interaction with students, he spoke about India’s preparations to become a fully developed nation by 2047 and emphasized that students would play a crucial role in achieving that national vision.

At Diakkawn High School, Kolasib, NCC cadets welcomed the Minister with a parade, while students showcased Mizo cultural performances. He was also shown practical demonstrations of vocational courses being taught to students under the framework of the New Education Policy (NEP). The Minister later interacted with teachers and students.

The Minister also visited Audrene Scism Children’s Home at Khuangpuilam, where staff briefed him on the welfare and care being provided to resident children. He subsequently visited the Anganwadi Centre at Kolasib Vengthar, which operates under the Thingdawl ICDS Project. There, he interacted with workers, children, and parents present at the centre.

Before concluding his visit to Kolasib, Shri Dr. L. Murugan launched the “Khed Bachao Abhiyan” initiative of ICAR, Kolasib. The campaign focuses on promoting chemical fertilizer-free cultivation, providing farmers with practical and advanced agricultural knowledge, and educating them on maintaining healthy soil for farming and land development.

The Union Minister also held an interaction at the ICAR Conference Hall with officials of ICAR and KVK Kolasib, as well as local farmers. Speaking on the occasion, he stressed the importance of producing healthy agricultural crops and highlighted the need to continually equip farmers with the latest technologies and agricultural innovations to improve both productivity and quality.

During the programme, he also released a publication prepared by ICAR experts titled “Weather-Based Agro-Advisories for Climate-Resilient Farming in Mizoram: A Compilation of Success Stories.”

Attachment

title: JEE 2nd PHASE REPORTING CHUNGCHANGA Hr. & TECHNICAL EDUCATION DEPARTMENT THUCHHUAH
content:
814/2026-2027

Aizawl the 3rd June, 2026:JEE 2026 result hmanga Mizoram State Quota Engineering course hrang hrang dil duhte tan Score Card Paper I & II la thehlut lo tan thehluh leh theih a ni a. Office hunchhungin Technical Wing Office, Higher & Technical Education, Chaltlang Lily Veng atanga form siamsa @ Rs. 10/- a la chhuakin Dt.25.06.2026 tlai dar 4:00pm ral hmain thehluh theih a ni e.

title: I&B and Parliamentary Affairs Union Minister chuan Kolasib-ah ICAR leh Zirna in hrang hrang a tlawh
content:
813/2026-2027

Kolasib, dated 3rd June, 2026:Kolasiba cham mek Shri Dr. L. Murugan, Union Minister of State for Information & Broadcasting and Parliamentary Affairs chuan vawiin chawhma khan Kolasib khaw chhunga Sawrkar hmalakna thenkhat leh zirna in te a tlawh a. Pu H.Dolianbuaia, Deputy Commissioner, Pu Lalrinpuia Varte, SP, Pu Vanlalchhana, District Education Officer, Pi C.Lalremruati, DCPO ten an tawiawm a ni.

Union Minister of State hian Regional Sports Training Centre, Saidan a tlawh a, RSTC zirlaiten football match lo entirin, he Centre tih changtlun lehzualna tura hmalakna tul zualte an sawipui a ni.

Union Minister chuan PM Government Model primary school-I, Kolasib, PM School for Rising India a tlawh a. Zirlaite nen inkawmna hun hmangin India ram chu kum 2047-ah chuan ram hmasawnna tluantling nei turin a inbuatsaih mek thu sawiin, chu inbuatsaihna tihlawhtling tur chuan zirlaite chu thawktu pawimawh tak an nih thu a sawi.

Union Minister of State Shri Dr. L.Murugan chuan Diakkawn High School, Kolasib a tlawhna ah NCC parade contingent ten chibai lo bukin, zirlaiten Mizo hnam lam an lo entir a. New Education Policy zulzuia eizawnna tling thiam thil (Vocational course) naupangte an zirtir dan a taka entir a ni a. Zirtirtu leh zirlaite nen inkawmhona hun an hmang bawk. Audrene Scism Children's Home, Khuangpuilam tlawh lehin thawktute chuan naupang awm mekte dinhmun leh enkawlna an pek dante an lo sawipui a. Minister hian Thingdawl ICDS Project hnuaia kalpui, Kolasib Vengthara Anganwadi Centre a tlawh a, thawktute bakah naupang leh nu leh pa lo kalte nen inkawmna hun an hmang bawk a ni.

Union Minister of State Shri Dr. L. Murugan chuan Kolasib a chhuahsan hma hian ICAR, Kolasib hmalakna a kalpui tur 'Khed Bachao Abhiyan' a tlangzarh a. Fertilizer tel loa thlai hrisel taka enkawl dan te, kuthnathawktute tana thiamna tangkai tam thei ang ber pek te, huan/lo, ram siam nana lei hrisel siam dan inzirtirte, hemi hnuaiah hian kalpui a ni dawn a ni.

Shri Dr. L. Murugan hian ICAR conference Hall-ah ICAR,  KVK, Kolasiba thawktute leh loneitute nen inkawmna hun hmangin, thlai hrisel tharchhuah pawimawhzia leh kuthnathawktuten thlai hrisel leh thahnem zawk an thar chhuah theih nan tunlai thiamna thar ber pek zel a pawimawh thu a sawi a. ICAR, Kolasiba mithiamte buatsaih 'Weather based Agro - Advisories for Climate resilient Farming in Mizoram, A Compilation of Success Stories' tih lehkhabu chu a tlangzarh nghal bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Health Minister in Siaha-a Nursing school sak mek leh MGCH a tlawh
content:
812/2026-2027

Siaha the 3rd June 2026:Siaha a cham mek Health & Family Welfare Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan tukin khan Siaha a Nursing School sak mek leh Maraland Gospel Centenary Hospital te a tlawh a, MADC CEM Pu M Laikaw leh sawrkar mite bakah zirlai pawl hruaitute leh party miten an tawiawm.

Minister chuan Nursing School sak mek, peihfel thawkhat tawh luahluh theihloa ala awm chu pawi a tih thu a sawi a, luah luh thuai a nih theih nana hmalak ngai leh thuamthat ngai lai te a enpui a, kumina luah luh ngei a nih theih nan a satu contractor chu theihtawp chhuah turin a chah.

Maraland Gospel Centenary Hospital a tlawhnaah thawktute nen inkawmin a changtu minister a nih angin an mamawh apiang a hnena thlen thin turin a chah a, District in hriselna lama hma a sawn theihna turin tanrual a pawimawh hle a ti bawk a ni. Pi Lalrinpuii hian vawiin chawhnu lamah District Hospital a tlawh nghal dawn bawk a ni.

Attachment
